problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
